## Summary

## Verification

- [ ] I ran the relevant offline e2e test(s) and recorded the command/output below.
- [ ] I updated or added e2e coverage for any externally observable behavior change.
- [ ] I checked that no keys, tokens, personal data, generated runtime state, or unrelated changes are included.
- [ ] I preserved the project's offline-first, clean-room, and Windows 10/11 constraints.
- [ ] I updated user-facing documentation when needed.

## Notes for reviewers
